title: Understanding Memory Layout in Systems Programming
text: Structures in compiled languages do not always occupy the exact sum of their field sizes. Compilers insert padding bytes to satisfy alignment requirements of the target architecture, which improves memory access speed at the cost of increased footprint. Consider a struct containing one byte followed by a four-byte integer: on a 32-bit boundary system, the compiler typically places three padding bytes after the first field so the integer begins at an address divisible by four. Programmers can reduce this overhead by reordering fields from largest to smallest alignment, a technique that collapses internal gaps without sacrificing readability.

title: 種痘法の歴史と社会的影響
text: 種痘法は、牛痘の膿を人に接種して天然痘を予防する技術であり、18世紀後半にイギリスの医師エドワード・ジェンナーが確立した。当時、天然痘は大流行し、高い致死率を記録していた。ジェンナーは乳搾り女工が牛痘にかかると天然痘に罹らないという地方の知見に注目し、1796年に少年ジェームズ・フィップスへの接種実験を行った。この発見は西洋医学における予防接種の黎明期を示す一方、宗教的・倫理的な反発や医療者間の対立も招いた。やがて19世紀に入ると、ヨーロッパ諸国で制度化的な予防接種が推進され、感染症対策の原型となった。

title: Bilingual Notes on Active Recall and Spaced Repetition
text: Active recall is a learning strategy that strengthens long-term retention by deliberately retrieving information from memory rather than re-reading passively. 能動的回想とは、受動的に読み返すのではなく、記憶から意図的に情報を引き出すことで長期記憶を強化する学習法である。Spaced repetition complements this by scheduling reviews at exponentially increasing intervals. 具体的には、復習の間隔を指数関数的に広げることで、忘却曲線に逆らって知識を定着させる。Together, these methods form the empirical foundation of efficient self-study across disciplines.

title: An Exploration of Quadratic Residues and the Legendre Symbol
text: Let p be an odd prime. An integer a, not divisible by p, is called a quadratic residue modulo p if there exists some integer x such that x² ≡ a (mod p). The Legendre symbol (a|p) provides a compact notation: it equals 1 when a is a quadratic residue, -1 when it is a non-residue, and 0 if p divides a. Euler’s criterion states that (a|p) ≡ a^((p-1)/2) (mod p). For example, with p = 7, we compute 3³ = 27 ≡ 6 ≡ -1 (mod 7), confirming that 3 is a non-residue modulo 7. This criterion forms the basis for the quadratic reciprocity law.
